positive: A clean, minimalist illustration of a stylized cosmic creature—a gentle, ethereal nebula whale swimming through a vibrant, deep space. The whale's body should be comprised of swirling galaxies and bioluminescent gas clouds, rendered with clean, defined lines and strong black silhouettes. The background features distant constellations and sharp, geometric stardust trails. Composition should be central and balanced, designed for a repeating apparel print. Style: Graphic design, vector illustration, high contrast, pop art influence. Lighting: Deep contrast between luminous teal, violet, and gold accents against an ultra-dark navy background. Suitable for screen printing.
